accessibility.text: Developers write code and documentation, and prompt the model with a list of available tools

Developers write code and documentation, and prompt the model with a list of available tools
LLMs can be trained to call developer-defined functions by predicting special tokens
Models predict what tool to use and what inputs to give the tool for a given query
